declarations.comments: Kind for effect labels. Each label corresponds to a category of side
declarations.title: GradeLabel

declarations.comments: Network I/O (HTTP calls to providers, external services)
declarations.title: Net

declarations.comments: Authentication credential usage (API keys, tokens, secrets)
declarations.title: Auth

declarations.comments: A Grade is a type-level list of GradeLabels, maintained in sorted order.
declarations.title: Grade

declarations.comments: Network + Auth — the common case for provider API calls.
declarations.title: NetAuth

declarations.comments: Full effect set — all effects permitted.
declarations.title: Full

declarations.comments: Type-level sorted set union. This is the Plus operation for the graded
declarations.title: GradeUnion
